evals.prompt: The Gemini Live session keeps disconnecting after 30 seconds of silence — how do I fix this?
evals.expected_output: Explains keep-alive/heartbeat mechanism, references the GeminiLiveSession class, mentions session timeout behavior, provides concrete code fix

evals.prompt: I want to add a delete feature so users can remove saved words from their word list in Firestore
evals.expected_output: Uses correct subcollection path users/{uid}/wordlists/{docId}, uses deleteDoc from firebase/firestore, adds function to firebase.ts service, follows existing patterns

evals.prompt: Convert the image translation endpoint to Python for a FastAPI backend
evals.expected_output: Uses google-genai Python SDK, preserves base64 stripping pattern, matches the same request structure, includes proper error handling and async patterns
